description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a two-story section, surrounded by a tall, solid fence. The exterior features a combination of smooth gray surfaces and stone-textured walls, giving it a contemporary and robust appearance. The front includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, and a small porch area is visible near the entrance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The backyard area appears to have a small patio with outdoor seating. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a blend of functional and aesthetic elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with stone and gray exterior, tall fencing, and asymmetrical large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and porch area with stone-textured facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, outdoor seating, and the tall fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the two-story section, large windows, and the blend of stone and smooth wall textures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the carport, driveway, and the rear section of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple facades
